case_title: TAYLOR, GERTRUDE vs. FIEDEL, M.D., FREDERICK et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE AS TO DEFENDANT FIEDEL, M.D., FREDERICK DOES 1- 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-30-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-10-1995
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-17-1995, CONTINUED TO JUN-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF POS PRIOR TO 6/30/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-28-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-28-1995, AS TO WHY THERE HAS BEEN NO DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE COMPLAINT. HEARING SET FOR JAN-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-02-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-30-1995, CONTINUED TO MAY-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF PROOF OF SERVICE BY 5/10/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-13-1995, CONTINUED TO NOV-28-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO WITHDRAW. ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS TO NOTIFY PLAINTIFF OF NEW DATE. (IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR COURT MAY DISMISS CASE) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF NOV-02-1995, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.
NOTICE OF NEW STATUS CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, GERTRUDE SERVED JUN-21-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIEDEL, M.D., FREDERICK
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF TO SERVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-14-1995, CONTINUED TO OCT-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 10/4/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
